name: Responses API with Per-User Keys

meta.description: A Manifold pipe to connect to a Responses API, and allow users to supply their own API key instead of the default one set by the admin, via UserValves.

manifest.title: Responses API with Per-User Keys
manifest.id: # This will appear as model-ID prefix in the model list.
manifest.author: Johan Grande
manifest.description: A Manifold pipe to connect to a Responses API, and allow users to supply their own API key instead of the default one set by the admin, via UserValves. Reuses Open WebUI's built-in payload conversion, header building, and SSE streaming helpers.
